name_en: ❤️B Brand Exquisite Letter Wide Strap Crossbody Bag, crafted with grained leather and Vintage checkered pattern, featuring an engraved button clasp. Includes detachable strap adorned with a floral jacquard brand logo. Easily transforms into a backpack or handbag. 25 x 8.5 x 18cm
